params.permissions: The contract where operator permissions are stored.
params.projects: The contract from which projects are minted.

onERC721Received(address,address,uint256.details: Configure posting criteria before transferring ownership here; this contract has no transfer-out function.

params.data: Unused; no payload is expected on the transfer.
params.from: Unused; any project NFT is accepted regardless of its prior owner.
params.operator: Unused; the transfer is authenticated by `msg.sender`, not the operator.
params.tokenId: The ID of the project NFT being received, used as the project ID the publisher is permitted on.

returns._0: magicValue The `IERC721Receiver.onERC721Received` selector that signals a successful receipt.

PERMISSIONS().notice: The contract where operator permissions are stored.

PROJECTS().notice: The contract from which projects are minted.

PUBLISHER().notice: The Croptop publisher contract that manages post allowances and content rules.

onERC721Received(address,address,uint256.notice: Give the Croptop publisher permission to post to the project on this contract's behalf.
